eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Mower, MN; at 3:49 AM on JUL 2, 2026 Effective until 6:49 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Mower County, MN - I 90 Closed East and West from Hwy 56 to Hwy 16 due to flooding.   Follow detours.
